title: MessagesResource unbounded sent storage
description:
File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:564-566

The MessagesResource inbox is bounded to _MESSAGES_MAX (100), but sent messages are never pruned:
```python
self._sent[msg_id] = copy.deepcopy(body)
if msg_id not in self._sent_order:
    self._sent_order.append(msg_id)
```

Over time, self._sent and self._sent_order grow without bound, causing memory exhaustion on constrained nodes.

Fix: Apply the same _MESSAGES_MAX limit to sent messages, or add a separate configurable limit.
